Reviews for Google Pixel Watch:
I have been using Pixel Watch 2 from the last few weeks now. Below are the Pros and cons:
Pros:
1) Battery Backup is really good as compared to Apple Watch.
2) Display looks premium.
3) Lightweight.
4) Fits perfectly
5) Seamless Fitbit integration.
6) Great AOD.
7) Blazing fast charging.
8) Great Haptics.

Cons:
1) Sometimes incorrect calculation of steps count.
2) No side button safety. It could get damaged easily.
3) That's it 😜
